item.title: Why is Premco Global Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, Premco Global Ltd’s stock price rose sharply by 7.94%, closing at ₹460.90, reflecting robust investor interest and significant outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Why is The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹139.80 with a gain of ₹2.85 or 2.08%. This upward momentum reflects a combination of robust financial performance, favourable valuation metrics, and sustained investor interest, positioning the stock well above key moving averages and outperforming broader market benchmarks. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Why is Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹162.60 with a gain of ₹4.60 or 2.91%. This upward movement reflects the stock’s continued outperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Why is Marico Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 07-May, Marico Ltd. has witnessed a notable rise in its share price, climbing 2.13% to ₹832.05, driven by robust financial performance, strong investor interest, and sustained market outperformance relative to benchmarks and sector peers. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Why is PTC India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, PTC India Ltd’s stock price rose sharply by 4.21% to close at ₹227.80, hitting a new 52-week high of ₹229.40. This significant uptick reflects the company’s robust market performance and favourable valuation metrics, which have attracted investor interest despite a recent decline in delivery volumes. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Why is Mayur Uniquoters Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, Mayur Uniquoters Ltd witnessed a significant price rise of 5.71%, closing at ₹605.00, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by strong financial performance and favourable market dynamics. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Why is Munjal Showa Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 07 May, Munjal Showa Ltd. witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹142.90, up ₹8.00 or 5.93% from the previous close. This notable gain reflects the stock’s robust performance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Why is Veerhealth Care Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 07-May, Veerhealth Care Ltd’s stock price rose by 1.18% to ₹21.39, continuing a sustained upward trajectory supported by robust investor participation and favourable technical indicators. Time: 56 minutes ago
